# Imagegen Bridge

> Image generation through Codex OAuth, exposed as a CLI, private HTTP API,
> dashboard, and typed Rust, Python, and TypeScript SDKs.

## Start here

- [Choose your path](https://crimsab.github.io/imagegen-bridge/getting-started/): Select the CLI, packaged container, API, or SDK workflow.
- [Docker quickstart](https://crimsab.github.io/imagegen-bridge/docker-quickstart/): Run the published GHCR image without cloning the source repository.
- [CLI guide](https://crimsab.github.io/imagegen-bridge/cli/): Install, configure, generate, edit, and inspect images from a terminal.

## Integration

- [HTTP API](https://crimsab.github.io/imagegen-bridge/api/): Requests, streaming events, jobs, artifacts, and stable errors.
- [SDK guide](https://crimsab.github.io/imagegen-bridge/sdks/): Rust, Python, and TypeScript clients.
- [Configuration](https://crimsab.github.io/imagegen-bridge/configuration/): Configuration precedence and supported settings.
- [Limits and guarantees](https://crimsab.github.io/imagegen-bridge/limits/): Payload limits, validation, retries, and safety boundaries.

## Operations

- [Deployment](https://crimsab.github.io/imagegen-bridge/deployment/): Authentication, mounts, networking, and production topology.
- [Operations runbook](https://crimsab.github.io/imagegen-bridge/operations/): Health, metrics, backups, upgrades, and troubleshooting.
- [Testing](https://crimsab.github.io/imagegen-bridge/testing/): Local, contract, and opt-in live tests.
- [Releasing](https://crimsab.github.io/imagegen-bridge/releasing/): Versioning and publication workflow.
- [FAQ](https://crimsab.github.io/imagegen-bridge/faq/): Authentication, providers, storage, and common deployment questions.

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Crimsab/imagegen-bridge)
